heading: Establishment of grant program
label: 10721 Establishment of grant program
notes: Short TitleFor short title of part MM of title I of , which is classified to this subchapter, as the “National White Collar Crime Control Act of 2017”, see , set out as a Short Title of 1968 Act note under .Pub. L. 90–351section 3030 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10101 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Director of the Bureau of Justice Assistance is authorized to enter into a cooperative agreement with or make a grant to an eligible entity for the purpose of improving the identification, investigation, and prosecution of white collar crime (including each category of such crimes set forth in paragraphs (1) through (3) of subsection (b)) by providing comprehensive, direct, and practical training and technical assistance to law enforcement officers, investigators, auditors and prosecutors in States and units of local government.
high-tech crime, including cyber and electronic crime and related threats;
economic crime, including financial fraud and mortgage fraud; and
Internet-based crime against children and child pornography.
